data.body: CALIBRATION ANALYSIS (171 sidecars/109 tickets/1412 findings). Refutation(validity) is dense+discriminating; revision-response is data-thin per criterion (most <10 episodes) and poorly differentiated (0.5-0.7) due to finder regeneration -> landed sidecar norm_id+location enrichment (UX-invisible, test-pinned) to mature it. Buckets: BLOCK-candidates(dual-signal): G6,COH,T5e,E2,G5(+marginal F1,T4). FP-PRONE(advisory): G1G2(0.35/indet41%),T6(0.31/40%),T5b,E5,E6,F4. CONFIDENT-BUT-IGNORED(advisory per user rule): T3,T10,T8. LOW-DATA(<25): E4,G3,T12,ISF,A1,T11,T5a,T5d,T5c(0 fires). Posting Step-5 interactive review.
